proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all patients, each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.
Across all patients, each one-level increase in ordinal-like `feature_025` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS `pfs_months ~ feature_041` estimated +0.1765 months per one-unit increase in `feature_041` (t=266.53, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS `pfs_months ~ feature_025` estimated -1.1897 months per one-level increase in `feature_025` (t=-83.99, p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_036` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 0.
Patients with binary `feature_043` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_036
analyses.result_summary: `feature_036=1` had mean PFS 3.703 months versus 5.055 months for `feature_036=0`, a difference of -1.3520 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_043
analyses.result_summary: `feature_043=1` had mean PFS 5.089 months versus 4.117 months for `feature_043=0`, a difference of +0.9722 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_056` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.
Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_050` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_056
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS estimated -0.0730 months per one-unit increase in `feature_056` (t=-27.68, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_050
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS estimated +0.4654 months per one-unit increase in `feature_050` (t=22.87, p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_001` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.
Patients with binary `feature_015` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_001
analyses.result_summary: `feature_001=1` had mean PFS 4.121 months versus 4.448 months for `feature_001=0`, a difference of -0.3268 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_015
analyses.result_summary: `feature_015=1` had mean PFS 4.114 months versus 4.419 months for `feature_015=0`, a difference of -0.3052 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_029` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.
Patients with binary `feature_066` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_029
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS estimated -0.00535 months per one-unit increase in `feature_029` (t=-8.44, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_066
analyses.result_summary: `feature_066=1` had mean PFS 4.094 months versus 4.322 months for `feature_066=0`, a difference of -0.2279 months (p=3.68e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_042` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042` equal to 0.
Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_028` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/t test: pfs_months ~ feature_042
analyses.result_summary: `feature_042=1` had mean PFS 4.526 months versus 4.305 months for `feature_042=0`, a difference of +0.2211 months in an unadjusted test (p=0.000228).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_028
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS estimated -0.000317 months per one-unit increase in `feature_028` (p=0.0126).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all 73 feature columns, binary `feature_042` remains positively associated with `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for all 73 feature columns, continuous `feature_028` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature columns; coefficient for feature_042
analyses.result_summary: In a full main-effect model with all 73 features, `feature_042` was no longer independently associated with PFS (beta=+0.0214 months, p=0.350).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature columns; coefficient for feature_028
analyses.result_summary: In the same full main-effect model, `feature_028` remained independently negative (beta=-0.000425 months per unit, p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all 73 feature columns, binary `feature_052` is associated with lower `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for all 73 feature columns, binary `feature_017` is associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature columns; coefficient for feature_052
analyses.result_summary: Full main-effect OLS estimated an adjusted `feature_052` coefficient of -0.0265 months (p=0.00206).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature columns; coefficient for feature_017
analyses.result_summary: Full main-effect OLS estimated an adjusted `feature_017` coefficient of +0.0489 months (p=0.0301).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_025` has a monotonic dose-like adverse relationship with `pfs_months`, with progressively lower mean PFS at values 0, 1, and 2.

analyses.code: Level summaries plus OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS by `feature_025` level was 5.271 months at 0, 4.054 months at 1, and 2.908 months at 2; the ordinal OLS slope was -1.1897 months per level (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_043` and `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_001` equals 1 than when `feature_001` equals 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_043 + feature_001 + feature_043:feature_001
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_001` at -1.6326 months (p<1e-300). Cell means showed the `feature_043` difference was +1.656 months when `feature_001=0` but only +0.027 months when `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_043` and `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_015` equals 1 than when `feature_015` equals 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_043 + feature_015 + feature_043:feature_015
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_015` at -1.4628 months (p<1e-300). Cell means showed the `feature_043` difference was +1.480 months when `feature_015=0` but only +0.026 months when `feature_015=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_043` and `pfs_months` decreases as continuous `feature_029` increases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_043 + feature_029 + feature_043:feature_029
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_029` at -0.02582 months per product-unit (p<1e-300), indicating higher `feature_029` attenuated the `feature_043` association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined adverse association of binary `feature_001=1` and binary `feature_015=1` with `pfs_months` is less negative than the sum of their separate adverse associations.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_001 + feature_015 + feature_001:feature_015
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_001:feature_015` at +0.5121 months (p<1e-300), supporting a less-than-additive adverse joint pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_043` and `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_066` equals 1 than when `feature_066` equals 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_043 + feature_066 + feature_043:feature_066
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_066` at -0.9892 months (p<1e-300). Cell means showed `feature_043` was +1.027 months when `feature_066=0` but -0.156 months when `feature_066=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association between ordinal-like `feature_025` and `pfs_months` becomes more negative as continuous `feature_041` increases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_041 + feature_025 + feature_041:feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_041:feature_025` at -0.00731 months per product-unit (p<1e-300), indicating the negative `feature_025` slope steepened at higher `feature_041`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_043` and `pfs_months` is stronger when binary `feature_042` equals 1 than when `feature_042` equals 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_043 + feature_042 + feature_043:feature_042
analyses.result_summary: A model adjusted for dominant main effects estimated `feature_043:feature_042` at +0.8891 months (p<1e-300), and raw cell means showed the `feature_043` difference was +0.941 months when `feature_042=0` versus +1.929 months when `feature_042=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association between binary `feature_036=1` and `pfs_months` becomes more negative as continuous `feature_041` increases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_041 + feature_036 + feature_041:feature_036
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_041:feature_036` at -0.00691 months per product-unit (p<1e-300), supporting stronger `feature_036` adversity at higher `feature_041`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between continuous `feature_029` and `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_001` equals 1.
The negative association between continuous `feature_029` and `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_015` equals 1.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_001 + feature_029 + feature_001:feature_029
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_001:feature_029` at +0.00800 months per product-unit (p<1e-300), attenuating the negative `feature_029` slope among `feature_001=1` patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_015 + feature_029 + feature_015:feature_029
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_015:feature_029` at +0.00774 months per product-unit (p<1e-300), attenuating the negative `feature_029` slope among `feature_015=1` patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between continuous `feature_056` and `pfs_months` becomes more negative as continuous `feature_041` increases.
The positive association between continuous `feature_050` and `pfs_months` becomes more positive as continuous `feature_041` increases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_041 + feature_056 + feature_041:feature_056
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_041:feature_056` at -0.000455 months per product-unit (p=5.82e-6).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_041 + feature_050 + feature_041:feature_050
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_041:feature_050` at +0.00388 months per product-unit (p=5.23e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint adverse association of ordinal-like `feature_025` and binary `feature_036=1` is less negative than the sum of their separate associations.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ core main effects + feature_025 + feature_036 + feature_025:feature_036
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated `feature_025:feature_036` at +0.0442 months (p=0.000111), consistent with less-than-additive adversity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Outside the dominant `feature_043` interaction cluster, binary `feature_064` combined with binary `feature_060` is associated with lower `pfs_months` than expected additively.
Outside the dominant `feature_043` interaction cluster, continuous `feature_035` combined with binary `feature_065` is associated with higher `pfs_months` than expected additively.

analyses.code: All pairwise OLS interaction screen: pfs_months ~ a + b + a:b
analyses.result_summary: All-pair interaction screening estimated `feature_064:feature_060` at -0.1876 months (p=0.000556); this was much weaker than the top `feature_043` interactions and should be considered exploratory.

analyses.code: All pairwise OLS interaction screen: pfs_months ~ a + b + a:b
analyses.result_summary: All-pair interaction screening estimated `feature_035:feature_065` at +0.00563 months per product-unit (p=0.00110); this was also exploratory.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a joint model including dominant main effects and selected interactions, the `feature_043:feature_001` interaction remains negative.
In a joint model including dominant main effects and selected interactions, the `feature_043:feature_015` interaction remains negative.
In a joint model including dominant main effects and selected interactions, the `feature_043:feature_029` interaction remains negative.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_001` at -1.7629 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_015` at -1.4758 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_029` at -0.02518 months per product-unit (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the joint selected-interaction model, the `feature_043:feature_066` interaction remains negative.
In the joint selected-interaction model, the `feature_001:feature_015` interaction remains positive.
In the joint selected-interaction model, the `feature_043:feature_042` interaction remains positive and significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated `feature_043:feature_066` at -1.7581 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated `feature_001:feature_015` at +0.5040 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: The initially positive `feature_043:feature_042` term attenuated in the joint interaction model and was not significant at alpha=0.05 (beta=+0.0754 months, p=0.0635).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the joint selected-interaction model, continuous `feature_041` remains independently positively associated with `pfs_months`.
In the joint selected-interaction model, binary `feature_066` retains a negative main effect after accounting for its interaction with `feature_043`.
In the joint selected-interaction model, continuous `feature_028` remains independently negatively associated with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint selected-interaction model estimated the `feature_041` main effect at +0.1739 months per unit (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: After including `feature_043:feature_066`, the `feature_066` main effect was essentially null (beta=-0.000154 months, p=0.993), refuting an independent negative main effect in this joint specification.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ dominant main effects + selected interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Joint selected-interaction model estimated `feature_028` at -0.000505 months per unit (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The dominant supported pattern is a conditional `feature_043` association: `feature_043` is beneficial overall, but its association is attenuated or reversed by `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

The dominant non-`feature_043` pattern is a stable main-effect axis in which higher `feature_041` and `feature_050` predict longer `pfs_months`, while higher `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_056`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_028` predict shorter `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Joint selected-interaction OLS; representative effect estimate is feature_043:feature_001
analyses.result_summary: The joint model retained large negative modifiers of the `feature_043` association: `feature_043:feature_001` beta=-1.7629, `feature_043:feature_015` beta=-1.4758, `feature_043:feature_029` beta=-0.02518, and `feature_043:feature_066` beta=-1.7581; all had p<1e-300.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS across all 73 feature columns; representative effect estimate is feature_041
analyses.result_summary: The full main-effect model supported the stated main-effect axis; representative coefficients included `feature_041` +0.1758, `feature_050` +0.4694, `feature_025` -1.1714, `feature_036` -1.3615, `feature_056` -0.0761, `feature_001` -0.3544, `feature_015` -0.2865, `feature_029` -0.00501, and `feature_028` -0.000425, all p<1e-300.
